title: Custom SW Music
description: Replaces the default disk music with music from Star Wars
body:
5- Anakin Vs Obi Wan

11- Rey's Theme

13- Episode 3 Opening

blocks- Anakin's Betrayal

cat- Cantina Theme

chirp- March of the Resistance

far- Love Pledge and the Arena

mall- General Grevious

mellohi- The Birth of the Twins and Padme's Destiny

otherside- The Rebel Fleet/End Title

pigstep- Duel of the Fates

relic- Han Solo and the Princess

stal- Anakin's Dark Deeds

strad- Imperial March

wait- Yoda's Theme

ward- Battle of the Heroes

Please donate to The Cinema Foundation.

About Charity: The Cinema Foundation is an all-industry 501(c)3 non-profit that uses data and collaboration to promote and expand the cinema industry.

The movie theater industry includes more than movie theaters. It is made up of key partners including filmmakers, studios, content providers, equipment and concession manufacturers, data and technology companies, and more who depend on the strength of theatrical exhibition and the communities we serve.

https://www.thecinemafoundation.org

All songs are property of Lucasfilm Ltd.
